title: Management Accountability Framework: Environment and Climate Change Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Management Accountability Framework: Environment and Climate Change Canada
The Management Accountability Framework (MAF) is a framework in which assessment is completed annually by the Treasury Board Secretariat to evaluate the management performance of government organizations. It enables public service managers, especially deputy heads, to identify management priorities to strengthen the performance of their organizations. For more information on Management Accountability Framework, please refer to the government’s oversight Management Accountability Framework section.
Management Accountability Framework assessments and departmental responses from previous years for Environment and Climate Change Canada can be found on the Government of Canada Web Archive
